summary: Completed comprehensive testing of White-Label Partner Sold Workflow System. Backend: 8/8 tests passed - PATCH /api/contacts tags endpoint triggers sold workflow, returns missing_fields, revalidate endpoint works, idempotency verified, date_sold auto-set, non-partner users not affected. Frontend: Partner list shows 'Sold Workflow Active' badge, partner edit form has complete Sold Workflow config section with toggle, required fields checkboxes, and endpoint configuration.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend sold_workflow.py correctly implements: is_sold_tag() for case-insensitive tag detection, sold_tag_just_added() for new tag detection, _resolve_partner_config() for partner lookup via store/org chain
Validation logic in _validate_sold_fields() checks: customer_name, phone_number, full_size_image, deal_or_stock_number (with mode-based logic), external_account_id
Idempotency check prevents duplicate events by checking existing events with validation_status=passed and delivery_status in [queued, sent, retrying]
date_sold and sold_tag_applied_at are auto-set only when Sold tag is first applied (not on re-application)
Scheduler runs process_sold_deliveries_job every 5 minutes to process queued deliveries with retry logic
Frontend white-label.tsx shows 'Sold Workflow Active' badge on partner cards with green checkmark icon when sold_workflow_enabled=true

Partner edit form includes complete Sold Workflow section: Enable toggle, Required Fields checkboxes (Customer Name, Phone Number, Full-Size Image, Deal or Stock Number), External Account ID Required checkbox, External Endpoint config (URL, auth type)
Contact detail page [id].tsx shows sold_workflow_status badge with status-appropriate icons and Fix & Complete / Retry buttons for failed states
SoldWorkflowModal provides form to fix missing fields and calls revalidate endpoint
seed_data_creation: Tests create temporary org/store/contact with cleanup - Calendar Systems partner already exists with sold_workflow_enabled=true
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sold Workflow System fully implemented and tested. Backend tests verify: (1) PATCH tags endpoint triggers workflow when Sold tag applied to partner-linked user's contact, (2) Returns missing_fields list for validation failures, (3) Revalidate endpoint re-validates after fields fixed, (4) Idempotency prevents duplicate events, (5) date_sold auto-set on first Sold tag, (6) Non-partner users get null sold_workflow, (7) Partner API includes sold_workflow fields. Frontend verified: White Label Partners page shows 'Sold Workflow Active' badge on Calendar Systems, partner edit form has Sold Workflow config section with all options. Note: External endpoint delivery is not tested (endpoint URL is empty for Calendar Systems).

backend_api.PATCH /api/contacts/{user_id}/{contact_i: PASS - Triggers sold workflow when Sold tag applied, returns sold_workflow object with status and missing_fields
backend_api.POST /api/sold-workflow/revalidate/{cont: PASS - Re-validates contact after fixing missing fields, returns updated status
backend_api.GET /api/sold-workflow/contact/{contact_: PASS - Returns events array, has_partner boolean, deal_or_stock_mode
backend_api.Idempotency: PASS - Applying Sold tag twice does not create duplicate events
backend_api.date_sold auto-set: PASS - date_sold and sold_tag_applied_at auto-set only on first Sold tag application
backend_api.Non-partner user: PASS - sold_workflow is null for users not linked to a partner
backend_api.GET /api/admin/partners/{id}: PASS - Includes full sold workflow config fields

frontend_ui.Partner list 'Sold Workflow Active' badg: PASS - Visible on Calendar Systems card with green checkmark icon
frontend_ui.Partner edit form Sold Workflow section: PASS - Has Enable toggle, Required Fields checkboxes, External Endpoint config
frontend_ui.Contact detail sold workflow status badg: VERIFIED IN CODE - Shows status-appropriate icon and text, Fix & Complete / Retry buttons
frontend_ui.SoldWorkflowModal: VERIFIED IN CODE - Provides form for missing fields, calls revalidate endpoint

mocked_apis_list: External endpoint delivery not tested - partner endpoint_url is empty
